hero.headline: Reliable Partner
hero.description: We handle customs declarations of any complexity, provide FEA consulting and logistics advice, and prepare a full document package — so your goods cross the border fast, legally, and without overpayments.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Full range of customs services — from consultation to final clearance. We handle all the bureaucratic process.
services.pageSubtitle: Full customs support for importers and exporters in Uzbekistan. We work fast, transparently and within the law.

process.title: Clearance
process.desc: We submit the declaration and handle all customs interaction.

process.title: Release
process.desc: Goods released. You receive all documents and a report.

about.pageSubtitle: Reliable partner in foreign trade and customs clearance. Helping businesses access international markets without customs complications since 2019.
about.p1: LLC VEDOVEC was founded in 2019 by a team of professionals with experience in foreign trade and customs law. Since then we have processed over 2000 customs cargo declarations in 2025, guided two companies through obtaining Authorized Economic Operator (AEO) status, and supported clients through customs audits.
about.p2: We specialize in FMCG goods — our clients include major distributors for DANONE, FERRERO, RUSAGRO, DOSHIRAK, DILMAH, SPLAT portfolios, as well as official representatives of MARS and INFAPRIM.
about.p3: A comprehensive approach: from initial consultation to full transaction support. Personal manager, responsible and prompt execution.

values.title: Transparency
values.desc: No hidden fees. Full report for every operation.

values.title: Speed
values.desc: We meet agreed deadlines. Guaranteed by contract.

values.title: Expertise
values.desc: Certified declarants with years of experience.

values.title: 24/7 Support
values.desc: Questions arise outside business hours too — we're always available.

about.ctaSubtitle: Come for a consultation at our Tashkent office or leave a request — we'll call back at a convenient time.

contacts.pageSubtitle: We respond quickly. Write on Telegram or leave a request — we'll get in touch within 30 minutes.

footer.description: Reliable partner in foreign trade and customs clearance in Tashkent.

fallbackServices.title: Import & Export Customs Clearance
fallbackServices.description: Customs declarations of any complexity — from FMCG to industrial equipment. Over 2000 declarations in 2025.

fallbackServices.title: FEA & Logistics Consulting
fallbackServices.description: We resolve your customs law questions, optimize your delivery route and customs burden. First consultation is free.

fallbackServices.title: Full Document Package Preparation
fallbackServices.description: We prepare all documents for customs clearance: contracts, invoices, packing lists, certificates of origin and permits.

fallbackServices.title: Certification & Permits
fallbackServices.description: Obtaining conformity certificates, sanitary and phytosanitary permits. We work with accredited bodies.

fallbackServices.title: AEO Status Registration
fallbackServices.description: We help companies obtain Authorized Economic Operator status. We have already guided 2 companies through the full process.

fallbackServices.title: Turnkey Solutions for Large Clients
fallbackServices.description: Comprehensive approach from initial consultation to full transaction support. Personal manager and priority processing.

fallbackCases.title: Customs clearance of equipment for a textile factory
fallbackCases.challenge: Import of specialised weaving equipment from Turkey with non-standard HS code classification.
fallbackCases.result: Saved 15% on customs duties, clearance in 2 days instead of the planned 5.

fallbackCases.title: Export of dried fruits to UAE
fallbackCases.challenge: Complex phytosanitary certification, UAE requirements for labelling and Arabic-language documentation.
fallbackCases.result: All permits obtained, cargo shipped on time, client signed a long-term contract.

fallbackCases.title: Regular electronics imports from China
fallbackCases.challenge: Organising regular consumer electronics shipments, minimising customs downtime.
fallbackCases.result: Process built with a 24-hour clearance guarantee, operating costs reduced by 20%.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by leading importers and exporters in Uzbekistan

fallbackTestimonials.text: We have been working with Vedovec for over two years. Not a single customs delay during this time. The team is always reachable and resolves issues quickly.
We approached with non-standard equipment classification. Vedovec resolved it in 2 days and helped save on customs duties.
They helped with phytosanitary certification for export to UAE. All documents were prepared precisely, the cargo was shipped on time.
